summary: Bahrain's posture is adoption-led. The National Cyber Security Center entered a strategic partnership with SandboxAQ to transition the national government toward a quantum-safe economy, with post-quantum cybersecurity to be deployed across roughly sixty ministry environments in anticipation of cryptographically relevant quantum computers and harvest-now decrypt-later risk.
govActors: NCSC | National Cyber Security Center, leads the national transition to quantum-safe cybersecurity across government
provenance: NCSC partnership + ~60 ministries + quantum-safe transition: Bahrain News Agency announcement, December 2025 (ingested T1)
dominantProcess omitted: deployment posture stated but no standards camp (NIST/ISO/ETSI) named - grey beats wrong
No standardFamilies, algorithms, hybrid stance, timeline or target stated
SandboxAQ vendor press release excluded by issuer rule (foreign vendor, not domestic institution)
